raw_html:
relu6

paddle.nn.functional. relu6 ( x: Tensor, name: str | None = None ) → Tensor [source]

relu6 activation

\[relu6(x) = min(max(0,x), 6)\]
Parameters

  • x (Tensor) – The input Tensor with data type float32, float64.

  • name (str|None, optional) – For details, please refer to api_guide_Name. Generally, no setting is required. Default: None.

Returns

A Tensor with the same data type and shape as x .

Examples

>>> import paddle
>>> import paddle.nn.functional as F

>>> x = paddle.to_tensor([-1, 0.3, 6.5])
>>> out = F.relu6(x)
>>> print(out)
Tensor(shape=[3], dtype=float32, place=Place(cpu), stop_gradient=True,
[0.        , 0.30000001, 6.        ])
